content:
FINAL CLOSEOUT — REMOVE LAST 3 BLOCKERS

Only three blockers remain.

Complete them now.

1. Verify whether picture_url already exists in the production Supabase database.
   - If missing, apply the migration.
   - Re-run registration with and without a picture.

2. Verify the deployment proof pipeline.
   - If GitHub token is available at runtime, create the final proof ledger.
   - If unavailable, return the exact runtime evidence showing why.

3. Verify the iOS application using the production build.
   - Confirm registration.
   - Confirm members.
   - Confirm dashboard.
   - Confirm same modules as Android.

After completing the above:

• Re-run all production checks.
• Verify GitHub SHA.
• Verify Render Deploy ID.
• Verify /health.
• Verify /version.
• Verify Members API.
• Verify Owner Chat.
• Verify Senior Developer execution.
• Verify proof ledger.

Return ONLY:

STATE:
PICTURE_URL_STATUS:
SUPABASE_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
ANDROID_STATUS:
MEMBERS_STATUS:
OWNER_CHAT_STATUS:
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_STATUS:
PROOF_LEDGER_STATUS:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Do not create another audit.
Finish the remaining work first.
Only return VERIFIED when all three blockers are resolved with production evidence.
